name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-mcs-policy-agent-da
title: Policy Agent (Declarative Agent) for Copilot Studio
shortDescription: A SharePoint-grounded Declarative Agent built in Copilot Studio that gives employees quick, summary-level answers to HR, IT and Finance policy questions.
longDescription: A SharePoint-grounded Declarative Agent built in Microsoft Copilot Studio that answers internal policy questions with multi-file referenced summaries, using Microsoft 365 grounding for fast time-to-value and minimal configuration.

thumbnails.alt: Policy Agent Declarative Agent in Copilot Studio

references.description: Build AI-driven agents and workflows with Microsoft Copilot Studio.
